author: doll-agent
content: Add multivariate_normal_array(mean: &Array<f64, Ix1>, cov: &Array<f64, Ix2>, size) on Generator<B>. Internally delegates to ferray_linalg::cholesky (closes #452 in the same shot) and uses contiguous slice access for the per-sample (Lz + mean) loop. Existing slice-based multivariate_normal stays for backward compat. ferray-random gains ferray-linalg as a dependency. 5 new tests cover shape, marginal means, non-square cov rejection, non-PD cov rejection, and recovery of an off-diagonal correlation.
